title: <div>- The opportunity to shape how an entire methodology develops before anyone
content:
- The opportunity to shape how an entire methodology develops before anyone else does
- Professional credit as Narrative Architect on a substantial project
- A case study for your own portfolio and future dramaturgical work
- The satisfaction of being first: establishing principles that future artists will build on

-----

**WHY THIS MATTERS BEYOND THE MONEY**

Here’s the thing: I generate prolifically but release nothing. You publish selectively but decisively. Together, we could establish something that doesn’t exist yet—a methodology for participatory narrative that preserves artistic coherence while enabling genuine collective agency.

That’s not a small thing. That’s intellectual contribution that would be referenced in future scholarship, that would shape how other artists think about audience, performance, and shared creation.

And it starts with you, in your Carolinas retreat, thinking about narrative on a screen with someone who’s been thinking about this system for a year and waiting for the right dramaturgist to help interpret it.
